demographics.living_situation: lives alone; currently housebound and socially isolated

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I feel an overwhelming, terrifying need to pee and then instantly soak my clothes before I can even stand up. I have not slept in days.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It has got dramatically worse over the past week — I'm leaking constantly and I'm up almost every hour through the night. I'm exhausted and desperate for help.

symptom_narrative.onset: I've had it for a long time but it flared badly about a week ago
symptom_narrative.duration: longstanding, acutely much worse for roughly the past week
symptom_narrative.character: a sudden, huge urge to pee that I physically cannot hold, and then I leak a big amount before I can get to the toilet
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: unbearable — I've had no proper sleep for days and I'm in tears
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: all day and all night — I'm going more than fifteen times a day and waking nearly every hour at night to pee
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: just hearing running water, or putting my key in the front door, sets it off instantly
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: no burning or stinging when I pee, no blood that I can see in the urine, and my stream is normal
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had milder versions of this for years but never anything like this
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm completely worn out and I can't leave the house — I'm terrified of having an accident in public

social_history_volunteered.diet_and_exercise: drinks a lot of coffee and tea through the day
social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: severely sleep-deprived and very distressed; housebound and socially isolated because of the leakage; lives alone

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a home cuff

objective_data_offered.value: tearful and visibly exhausted, sitting cautiously on a towel; multiple soiled garments nearby and pathways to the bathroom cleared for rapid access
